notes: Reliability hardening (no UI changes): the Bioyond scheduler links (Rob INTF :56788 + LIMS HTTP :8080) now self-recover if the connection drops or the port is briefly busy, instead of needing an app restart; hardened the in-app updater (no file-handle leaks; an integrity-check failure discards the download); guarded against a malformed oversized network request; better background survival on OEM/Lenovo tablets via a one-time battery-optimisation exemption.
